content:
# Recommendations — for the iter-009 plan agent

## TOP PRIORITY — strategic fork (the planner's own HARD REVERSAL has fired)
iter-008 plan (lines 20–25) committed: *"If `sheafifyTensorComparison` does NOT land iter-008, iter-009
pivots OFF the monoidal route to P1b-iii … This is the one-more-iter budget the route gets."*
**The unconditional `sheafifyTensorComparison` did NOT land** — only `…OfLocallyBijective` (conditional on a
hypothesis that is provably hard). The blocker is now *characterised*, not just "substantial": it needs a
**large absent Mathlib brick** (`MonoidalClosed (PresheafOfModules R)` / stalkwise injectivity), not more
tactic effort. So the budget is spent. Choose ONE, explicitly:
- **(Recommended) Pivot to P1b-iii.** Realize the opaque Props gating 3 of the 6 real sorries —
  `IsLocallyFreeOfFiniteRankOn` (gates 1.3), `extGroup`, `IsLFPAndFlatOn`. This unblocks actual paper
  theorems and stops the flat-6 streak. The braiding/unitor/comparison investment is preserved on disk and
  reused whenever the monoidal route is later resumed.
- **(Only if committing real budget) Route (b): `MonoidalClosed (PresheafOfModules X.presheaf)`.** Prover's
  precise recipe: give `PresheafOfModules X.presheaf` a `MonoidalClosed` instance + prove "internal hom of a
  sheaf-target is a sheaf", then mimic `Mathlib/CategoryTheory/Sites/Monoidal.lean`'s `whiskerLeft`/
  `whiskerRight` to get `(Opens.grothendieckTopology X).W.IsMonoidal`. This discharges all four hypotheses
  AND yields the full localized monoidal structure (assoc/pentagon/coherence) on `SheafOfModules` for free
  via `CategoryTheory.Localization.Monoidal`. **Large, multi-iter, high-risk.** Do NOT enter this without a
  scoped sub-plan; it is a Mathlib-contribution-sized brick.

## DO NOT re-assign (blocked, alternatives exhausted)
- **Unconditional `sheafifyTensorComparison` / `tensorAssoc`** via the direct presheaf route. The hypotheses
  reduce to "tensoring by `Q` preserves local injectivity of `η`", which is **FALSE at the presheaf level**
  (`−⊗Q` not left exact; `ℤ/2 ⊗ (·2:ℤ→ℤ)`). Re-dispatching the same approach a third time will churn. Only
  the stalks or MonoidalClosed route changes the outcome.
- `H_tensor_invertible` (1.1.2): still gated — it needs the **unconditional** associator, which does not exist.
- The 5 opaque-conclusion sorries (`H_locallyFree_of_ext_vanishing`, `ext_finite_flat` 2nd conjunct,
  `exists_acyclic_surjection`) and `exists_free_resolution_step` (descent axiom too weak) — unchanged.

## Bankable partial win (low-risk, if staying on the monoidal route one more step)
- **Local SURJECTIVITY of `sheafifyTensorUnitWhiskerRight/Left`** is TRUE and presheaf-provable
  (right-exactness: section of `P'⊗Q` is finite Σ pᵢ'⊗qᵢ, each pᵢ' locally in `im η`; intersect the covers).
  Moderate effort, no new infra. Halves the gap (only local injectivity would remain). Worth assigning ONLY
  if the planner chooses route (b); otherwise it is orphaned work.

## Blueprint coverage debt (leandag `unmatched` = 7) — planner must blueprint
All `lean_aux`, no tex block. (file = `MR0555258CompactifyingPicard/Basic.lean`)
1. `sheafification_map_isIso_of_locallyBijective` (~220) — UNCONDITIONAL, axiom-clean. Deps: `PresheafOfModules`
   sheafification = localization at `J.W.inverseImage (toPresheaf)` + `Localization.inverts` +
   `W_of_isLocallyBijective`. **Give it its own reusable `lemma:` block** (it is the engine; will be reused
   by any future monoidal work).
2. `sheafifyUnit` (~240) — sheafification unit `η_P`. Helper; fold under a `def:` block.
3. `sheafifyTensorUnitWhiskerRight` (~250), `sheafifyTensorUnitWhiskerLeft` (~291) — `η⊗𝟙` / `𝟙⊗η`. Helpers.
4. `sheafifyTensorComparisonOfLocallyBijective` (~270), `sheafifyTensorComparisonLeftOfLocallyBijective` (~302)
   — **conditional** realizations of `lem:sheafifyTensorComparison`. Re-point that block's `\lean{}` here OR
   restate the lemma WITH local-bijectivity hypotheses.
5. `tensorAssocOfLocallyBijective` (~333) — **conditional** realization of `lem:tensorMod_assoc`. Same choice.

## Blueprint correction needed (semantic — review already flagged with `% NOTE:`)
- `lem:sheafifyTensorComparison` proof sketch (chapter lines 310–321) contains a **false claim**: "−⊗Q …
  preserves local bijectivity." Only surjectivity is preserved; injectivity is false. Planner must rewrite
  the sketch (drop the false step; cite the stalks/MonoidalClosed route) and decide whether the lemma is
  stated conditionally (with hypotheses, matching the conditional decl) or via the deeper route.
- The `\lean{}` hints on `lem:sheafifyTensorComparison` (`…sheafifyTensorComparison`) and `lem:tensorMod_assoc`
  (`…tensorAssoc`) point to **non-existent** decls — re-point to the `…OfLocallyBijective` names or restate.

## Reusable proof patterns discovered (also in PROJECT_STATUS KB)
- **Sheafification inverts a local iso of presheaves of modules** = `Localization.inverts` on
  `sheafification α` at `J.W.inverseImage (toPresheaf)`, with `J.W_of_isLocallyBijective`. Take local
  inj/surj as **explicit args + `haveI`**, never `[instance]` (synthesis sticks on the `J` metavariable at
  the `α = 𝟙` application site).
- Presheaf `MonoidalCategory.associator` needs `(C := PresheafOfModules (R ⋙ forget₂ CommRingCat RingCat))`
  pinned; the `X.ringCatSheaf.obj` form (defeq) does not synthesize `MonoidalCategoryStruct`.
